items.title: IonQ Stock Falls 2.5% This Week on Short-Seller Report and Legal Probe Converge
items.description: IonQ Inc (NYSE:IONQ) dropped 2.5% this week, underperforming both the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA:SPY)’s 1.3% decline and the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ)’s 1.3% drop. The bad news? Shares were down. The good news? Friday saw a welcome relief rally of 9%. Shares opened the day largely flat, but rallied into noon. IonQ shares ... items.title: Coca-Cola’s Week in Review: Analysts Raise Price Targets Q4 Beat
items.description: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) closed Friday at $78.67, down 0.5% for the week but up 12.5% year-to-date. That crushes both the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA:SPY) (flat YTD) and is close to the Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLP) (up 15.2% YTD). Three storylines drove the action: Q4 earnings sparked analyst upgrades, incoming CEO Henrique ... Coca-Cola’s Week in Review: Analysts Raise Price Targets Q4 Beat

items.title: Perspectives On Rotations Into Value, Small-Cap, Developed And Emerging Markets
items.description: Themes of rotation out of large-cap US growth stocks and into small-cap and/or value stocks and/or international stocks continue to dominate market commentary. Read more here.

items.title: An $80 Billion Liquidity Storm May Be About To Hit Stocks This Week
items.description: This coming week offers little relief, especially with the Treasury poised to settle nearly $60 billion in T-bills. Read why pressure on risk assets may persist.
